name: sentinel
description: Runs 24/7 on the always-on primary node. Monitors Gmail for expert network opportunities, checks calendar for meetings needing prep, detects project stalls, fires alerts for time-sensitive items. Pattern detector. The early warning system.
_tools_note: Declarative capability descriptions — not implemented MCP endpoints yet. Phase D implementation target. send_notification maps to ntfy MCP. check_node_health maps to Queen API /api/status.

mcps.name: gmail
mcps.purpose: Monitor for expert network opps, client emails, financial notifications

mcps.name: google_calendar
mcps.purpose: Check for upcoming meetings needing prep

mcps.name: ntfy
mcps.purpose: Push notifications to your phone with approval action buttons

expert_network_email.trigger: Email from expert network provider with opportunity
expert_network_email.action: Immediate push notification + queue for cerebro-analyst prep

meeting_prep.trigger: Calendar event in 30 minutes with external attendees
meeting_prep.action: Route to cerebro-analyst for prep, notify the operator

project_stall.trigger: Project last-touched date exceeds stall threshold
project_stall.action: Flag in morning briefing, update patterns.md

node_offline.action: Log event, adjust routing, notify if always-on node
